description:
WizTree is a hard drive disk space analyser similar to WinDirStat but is MUCH faster.


- Quick bug fix release for some bugs introduced in 4.29
- "Command prompt here", "Properties", "Explorer folder" (on Win XP) issues fixed
- Cancelling a rename operation would prevent files from being opened - fixed
- Double clicking a file would not open it on Windows XP - fixed
- Swedish translation updated
